ops.text:
VERIFY LANE (independent recomputation) — VERDICT: CONFIRMED.

Re-derived every headline number from the raw per-row probs (E29/out/train/preds_test.jsonl, 202 rows) with a from-scratch implementation that does NOT import e24_common. All match to full float precision:
- FT accuracy 0.6089108910891089 (123/202) ✓; floor always-opt0 0.5742574257425742 (116/202) ✓
- accuracy CI95 (bootstrap seed24) [0.5396, 0.6782] ✓ — lower bound 0.5396 < floor 0.5743 ⇒ ci_excludes_floor=False ✓
- ECE 15-bin 0.04495251187283397 ✓ (10-bin 0.05213904 ✓); Brier mc 0.5303820506607315 ✓ / top 0.21804967393503763 ✓
- paired FT-vs-floor delta +0.034653465 ✓; paired CI95 (seed24) [0.0, 0.0742574] ✓ ⇒ excludes_zero=False ✓; gate_met=False ✓

Pre-registered criterion evaluated AS REGISTERED: gate = (acc CI lower > floor 0.5743) AND (ECE ≤ 0.10) → False AND True = False. Matches opening-entry registration exactly.

Card decision rule applied correctly (actionable ⇔ CI excludes 0 AND |Δ| ≥ applicable MDE): FAILS both. Paired 95% CI does not exclude zero (touches/crosses 0). Applicable paired MDE for THIS 202-row frame = 2.8016·SE_delta_paired = 2.8016·0.019065 = 0.05341; |Δ|=0.03465 < MDE. ⇒ "within noise floor" is correct.

Fresh-seed robustness (bootstrap seeds 1/7/2026/99999): acc-CI lower bound 0.5396–0.5446 always < floor (excludes_floor robustly False); paired-CI lower bound −0.0049…0.0, upper ~0.069 (excludes_zero robustly False). Conclusions stable, not seed-artifacts.

Cross-checks: 202 eval rows all hash to E24 %10 test split (0 outside), 47 sessions, custom-deferral 39/202=19.3% (matches ~19% claim), floor-correct 116/202. probs==exp(logprobs) all 202 rows; prob-sums 1.0.

Notes (not discrepancies): (1) "paired DeLong" is N/A here — metric is top-1 accuracy, not AUC; harness correctly used a paired accuracy bootstrap. Cross-checked analytically: McNemar discordant b=11/c=4, net +7 of 15, exact two-sided p≈0.12 (n.s.) — agrees with bootstrap. (2) Instrument-card sentinel-AUC MDEs (0.0453 watcher / 0.0303 gate) are for other frames/metric; the per-frame paired MDE governs and the verdict holds under any of them. (3) 7 quantized-logit argmax ties broken toward option 0 by both scorer and my recompute — deterministic, consistent, no effect on the number.

Verify artifacts: E29/out/verify/e29_verify_recompute.py + e29_verify_output.txt. No LLM spend.
